details.test: Task 1: Monthly $35 Pediatric Cancer Care Fund donation in honor of Alex Kim
Task 2: Find and save closest in-person breast cancer counseling near 94105
Task 3: Register for free April 2025 evening nutrition during chemo webinar
Task 4: Apply for caregiver financial assistance (transportation & medication, < $50k)
Task 5: Sign up for weekend morning patient support shift at main campus (next 2 months)
Task 6: Join online weekly support group for caregivers of children with leukemia
Task 7: Save three recent adult-focused chemo side effect articles to reading list
Task 8: Build care package with three different items under $75 and checkout
Task 9: Find and copy link to 2023 lymphoma young adult survivor story
